news.headline: Kaspi.kz reveals 3Q & 9M 2024 financial results. Operates Kaspi.kz Super App & Kaspi Pay Super App. Nasdaq:KSPI.
news.summary: Almaty, Kazakhstan - On October 18, 2024, Joint Stock Company Kaspi.kz announced its unaudited consolidated IFRS financial results for the third quarter and nine months ended on September 30, 2024. Kaspi.kz, publicly traded on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol KSPI, is the company behind the Kaspi.kz Super App for consumers and Kaspi Pay Super App for merchants. The financial report covers the company's performance during this period, providing insights into its revenue, profit, and overall financial health.

news.headline: P&G FY 2025 Q1 net sales down 1% to $21.7B, organic sales up 2%, diluted net EPS $1.61, a 12% decrease vs. prior year.
news.summary: In Cincinnati, the Procter & Gamble Company (NYSE:PG) announced its first-quarter fiscal year 2025 net sales of $21.7 billion, reflecting a one percent decrease compared to the previous year. Organic sales, which do not consider foreign exchange and M&A impacts, saw a two percent increase from the prior year's seven percent growth. Diluted net earnings per share stood at $1.61, marking a 12% drop from the previous year primarily due to increased non-core restructuring charges.

news.headline: TreeHouse Foods recalls waffle products due to Listeria risk. Remember to check products for safety.
news.summary: TreeHouse Foods, Inc., a company based in Oak Brook, Illinois, announced on October 18, 2024, that they are issuing a voluntary recall of specific frozen waffle items. The recall is due to a possible contamination with Listeria monocytogenes, a harmful organism that can lead to severe health issues if consumed. The affected products are being removed from shelves as a precautionary measure to ensure consumer safety. It is crucial for individuals to check their frozen waffle products for the mentioned recall, as the presence of Listeria monocytogenes poses a serious health risk. This cautionary action by TreeHouse Foods, Inc. (NYSE: THS) is essential to prevent any potential health concerns related to the consumption of these products.

news.headline: Netflix and Intuitive Surgical signal buys; Apple gains on China iPhone sales. Dow Jones Futures flash signals.
news.summary: Netflix and Intuitive Surgical have shown positive buy signals on their recent earnings reports. Apple also regained a buy point following strong sales of the iPhone 16 in China. Investor optimism was reflected in the market as Dow Jones Futures reacted positively to these developments. This news was featured on Investor's Business Daily, highlighting the encouraging performance of these companies.

SLB reports Q3 2024 revenue of $9.159M, up 10% YoY. Income before taxes increased by 8% YoY to $1.507M.
news.summary: SLB reported its third-quarter 2024 results, with revenue reaching $9.159 billion, a 10% increase from the previous quarter and a notable rise from $8.31 billion in the same period last year. Income before taxes on a GAAP basis rose to $1.507 billion, marking a 6% increase from the previous quarter and an 8% increase year-on-year. The income before taxes margin on a GAAP basis stood at 16.5%, representing a 91 bps increase sequentially but a decrease of 33 bps from the same period last year. Net income attributable to SLB on a GAAP basis was not provided in the excerpt.

news.headline: Billionaire investor Ray Dalio urges China to implement "beautiful deleveraging" strategy to prevent debt crisis, praises China's potential and readiness to do so.
news.summary: Ray Dalio, founder of Bridgewater Associates, urged China to adopt a "beautiful deleveraging" strategy alongside recent stimulus measures to prevent a potential debt crisis. At the FutureChina Global Forum, he emphasized the need for a balanced approach to deficits. This strategy involves debt restructuring, money printing, and debt monetization. Dalio explained that debt restructuring is deflationary while money creation is inflationary, making it an effective way to lessen the debt burden. He expressed confidence in China's capability to implement this strategy, citing recent policies as evidence. Dalio sees China's approach to its debt issue as a crucial question and believes they have the capacity and willingness to address it.

news.summary: Newport News, Virginia - Notification has been issued regarding transactions conducted by Persons Discharging Managerial Responsibilities ("PDMRs") in common stock with a par value of $0.0001 each in the company ("Shares"). Vesting has been announced for the Ferguson Enterprises Inc. Long Term Incentive Plan 2019 ("LTIP"), Ferguson Enterprises Inc. Ordinary Share Plan 2019 ("OSP"), and Ferguson Enterprises Inc. Performance Ordinary Share Plan 2019 ("POSP"), collectively known as "the Plans." The conditional shares that were granted under the Plans on October 14, 202 have now vested.

news.summary: Skillman, New Jersey - Kenvue Inc. (NYSE: KVUE) is scheduled to release its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 on November 7, 2024, before the market opens. This announcement will provide stakeholders and investors with key insights into the company's performance during this period. The information shared in this report will likely impact the company’s stock price and overall market perception, making it a significant event for those following Kenvue's progress.

news.headline: Novartis gets positive CHMP opinion for Kisqali® to reduce recurrence in HR+/HER2- early breast cancer patients.
news.summary: Novartis revealed that the CHMP of the EMA has given a favorable opinion recommending approval for Kisqali® (ribociclib) for treating adults with hormone receptor-positive/human epidermal growth factor receptor 2-negative early breast cancer at high risk of recurrence, also covering those with node-negative disease1. This signifies a significant milestone for Novartis as it progresses towards potentially obtaining marketing authorization for this medication in the European market. It highlights the potential impact this approval can have on patients, showcasing advancements in breast cancer treatment within the region.

news.headline: Kioxia showcases flexible data placement in SSD running RocksDB at 2024 OCP Global Summit.
news.summary: In a recent update from Tokyo, KIOXIA Corporation, a prominent player in memory solutions, is set to exhibit the advantages of a KIOXIA XD Series SSD at the 2024 OCP Global Summit. The SSD showcases the innovative feature known as FDP, as defined in the NVM Express™ Technical Proposal TP4146, enabling adjustable data placement within the solid-state drive. This demonstration is poised to highlight the SSD's capability of running ROCKSDB efficiently.

news.headline: ELFBAR and LOST MARY form UK advisory board in the vaping industry. Key leaders to provide strategic guidance.
news.summary: In London on October 18, 2024, major players in the vaping industry, ELFBAR and LOST MARY, revealed the establishment of an advisory board in the UK. This board aims to offer strategic counsel to the brands. It comprises senior-level experts from various pertinent fields in the UK. This development highlights the companies' commitment to tapping into diverse expertise to enhance their operations.

news.headline: BlueNord updates Tyra II project progress. Transformer repair ahead of schedule. #BlueNord #TyraII #TotalEnergies
news.summary: In Oslo, Norway on October 18, 2024, BlueNord ASA shared an update on Tyra II based on data from TotalEnergies, the operator. The repair of the second transformer at Tyra is ahead of schedule.

This innovative platform covers all facets of software development and aims to revolutionize the industry. With its headquarters listed on the Bombay Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol 533179 and on the National Stock Exchange under the symbol PERSISTENT, Persistent Systems continues to drive advancements in technology on a global scale.

news.headline: Eaton appoints A.D. Naik as senior VP of FP&A and finance transformation, starting from October 23, 2024.
news.summary: Eaton, a leading intelligent power management company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol ETN, revealed the appointment of A.D. Naik as the senior vice president for FP&A and finance transformation effective from October 23, 2024. In his new capacity, Naik will oversee the global financial planning & analysis operations and drive finance transformation strategies for the company. Reporting directly to Olivier Leonetti, who serves as the executive vice president and chief financial officer, Naik will also become a key member of the senior leadership team at Eaton.

news.headline: Atmus Filtration Tech announces $0.05 dividend per share, payable Nov 13, 2024. Q3 results on Nov 8, 2024.
news.summary: Atmus Filtration Technologies Inc., a major player in the filtration industry, revealed plans for a quarterly cash dividend of $0.05 per common share. The dividend is set to be paid on November 13, 2024, to shareholders of record as of October 31, 2024. In addition, the company will release its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 before the market opens on Friday, November 8, 2024.

news.headline: CrossAmerica Partners will reveal Q3 2024 earnings on Nov 6. Stay tuned for important updates.
news.summary: The recent report on the global economy indicates a growth rate of 3.2% for the current year, with emerging economies leading the way with a growth of 4.0%. Developed economies are expected to grow by 2.3% in the same period. The report also highlights a projected increase in global trade volume by 2.5%, driven mainly by strong growth in Asia with an estimated 6.1% increase. However, uncertainties such as trade tensions and geopolitical risks pose threats to the positive outlook. Inflation rates are projected to remain moderate at around 2.5%, while unemployment rates are expected to decline slightly to 5.5% worldwide. Overall, the global economic forecast for the year is cautiously optimistic, but challenges persist in the form of potential disruptions to the current growth trajectory.

news.headline: Autoliv's Q3 2024 financial report: $2.555 billion net sales, 0.8% organic sales decline, $1.74 diluted EPS, 8.9% operating margin.
news.summary: AutoLIV (ALV) reported their financial highlights for Q3 2024, with $2,555 million net sales showing a 1.6% decrease, and a 0.8% decline in organic sales. The operating margin stood at 8.9%, and adjusted operating margin at 9.3%. Diluted EPS saw an 11% increase to $1.74, and adjusted diluted EPS also saw an 11% increase to $1.84. The company expects around 1% organic sales growth for the full year 2024, with a negative FX effect on net sales of around 1%. They anticipate an adjusted operating margin of approximately 9.5-10.0% and an operating cash flow of around $1.1 billion for the year. In Q3, the company showcased solid performance in Europe and Asia, failing to meet expectations in China due to a negative LVP mix. Despite slight net sales decline, profitability remained stable due to cost reductions and commercial recoveries, with operating margin at 8.9%. Operating cash flow was as expected at $177 million, aiming for $1.1 billion for the full year.

news.headline: Key digital trends for 2024: AI & Quantum Computing mainstreaming. Study on AI development, telecom roles. - ResearchAndMarkets.com
news.summary: Dublin-based ResearchAndMarkets.com has recently included the "Key Digital Trends in 2024" report in its offerings. This report delves into the mainstream adoption of AI and the progression of Quantum Computing, highlighting insights gathered from Vivatech. The overview offers a thorough examination of pivotal digital trends that are gaining traction. It focuses on three primary trends: Artificial Intelligence (AI), exploring the present status of its development, regulatory frameworks, governance structures, and ethical dilemmas. Additionally, the report delves into the involvement of telecom operators in the rise of AI. Overall, the study provides critical analysis and forecasts concerning the aforementioned trends, shaping the digital landscape.

Ducommun Inc rings NYSE Closing Bell to mark 175th anniversary as oldest operating company in Calif.
news.summary: Ducommun Incorporated, a leading provider of advanced electronic and structural solutions for the aerospace & defense sector, recently marked its 175th year in operation. Recognized as the oldest continuously running company in California, Ducommun commemorated this milestone by participating in the ringing of the Closing Bell at the New York Stock Exchange on October 11, 2024. Trading under the symbol NYSE: DCO, the company's legacy and ongoing commitment to innovation in the industry were celebrated during this event.

news.headline: Dubai Studio City sees 12% growth in global talent community in 2024, focuses on Indian creatives at Broadcast India show.
news.summary: Dubai Studio City, a division of TECOM Group PJSC, presented opportunities for Indian creatives at the Broadcast India show in Mumbai. As a prominent hub for content creation in the Middle East, alongside Dubai Media City and Dubai Production City, it caters to notable Indian industry players like Zee. This initiative aimed to foster growth and collaboration, emphasizing the strong presence of Indian talent in Dubai with significant opportunities for partnership and expansion.

news.headline: David Joyner appointed as CEO of CVS Health. Preliminary guidance: Q3 2024 EPS $0.03 to $0.08, Adjusted EPS $1.05 to $1.10. Roger Farah is Executive Chairman.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, CVS Health disclosed that Roger Farah has been appointed as the Executive Chairman of the Board. The company has issued preliminary guidance for the third quarter of 2024, expecting GAAP diluted Earnings per Share (EPS) to fall within the range of $0.03 to $0.08. Additionally, the company anticipates Adjusted EPS to be in the range of $1.05 to $1.10 during the same period. This update was revealed by CVS Health based in Woonsocket, R.I. on October 18, 2024, without further details on the source of the information.

news.headline: CHMP maintains negative opinion on Translarna reexamination, to be reviewed by European Commission. PTCT announces on Oct. 18, 2024.
news.summary: The European Commission is set to reevaluate the opinion of PTC Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: PTCT), a company based in Warren, N.J. On October 18, 2024, it was reported that the Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use (CHMP) of the European Medicines Agency has upheld its unfavorable stance on the company's product. This decision comes amidst ongoing discussions regarding the approval of the medication, raising concerns within the pharmaceutical industry. The future actions and ramifications of this review will be closely monitored by stakeholders and investors.

news.headline: Delta Dental launches "The (M) Factor" to raise awareness on oral health and menopause connection before World Menopause Day.

Delta Dental, a prominent dental benefits provider, has initiated efforts to raise awareness about the relationship between oral health and menopause through this film.

news.headline: Telcos aim to boost cybersecurity against quantum computing threats; report highlights need for stronger defenses.
news.summary: A recent report titled "Cryptography Within Telcos: Ramping Up Cybersecurity" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report discusses the growing concern of quantum computing as a major cybersecurity threat capable of compromising widely used cryptographic algorithms. The study aims to examine the increasing risks of cyber threats, focusing on the telecom sector, emphasizing the urgent need for telecom companies to enhance their cybersecurity measures in response to these evolving challenges. Establishing robust cybersecurity protocols is essential for telcos to safeguard sensitive data and information.

The report covers the global market for doors and windows, categorized by product (doors, windows), construction type (swinging, sliding, folding, revolving), material (wood, metal, plastic), end-use industries (residential, commercial, industrial), and region. news.headline: LaNova Medicines begins Phase 1 trial of anti-PD-1/VEGF antibody with $42M financing. Strong preclinical results shown. IND submission in US second half.
news.summary: A Phase 1 clinical trial for LM-299, an anti-PD-1/VEGF BsAb, has been commenced in China for advanced solid tumors. This decision follows successful preclinical studies showing significant tumor growth inhibition and a favorable safety profile. Plans are underway to submit an Investigational New Drug (IND) application for LM-299 in the United States during the latter part of the year.

news.headline: Highland Electric Fleets awarded $10.9M by US DOE for V2G project to accelerate adoption. #CleanEnergy #EVs
news.summary: In Beverley, Massachusetts, on October 18, 2024, the Grid Deployment Office of the U.S. Department of Energy announced that the Scaling Vehicle-to-Grid Integration Nationally (SVIN) project has been chosen to receive around $10.9 million in cost-share funding. This funding aims to speed up the adoption of Vehicle-to-Grid (V2G) technology nationwide.
